events.text: Initialize a dedicated configuration profile for this environment.
Review available configurations and confirm the new profile exists.
Register a machine entry with network and user details.
Inspect the configured machine list to verify registration.
Set the default machine to reduce repeated targeting flags.
Run a basic remote host check to validate connectivity.
Run a second host check focused on system runtime health.
Execute environment diagnostics to catch setup issues early.
Apply infrastructure settings for public access and certificates.
Display infrastructure configuration to verify the final state.
